alt_text: Snowmass ski resort, Aspen Colorado - hero view of Big Burn and Cirque
notes: Major CO Aspen-Snowmass alpine resort, ~98 trails, world-class. Fallback: onthesnow.com/colorado/snowmass/ski-resort. Stage-26 fetch hero.

alt_text: Snowriver Mountain Resort Michigan UP - alpine slope view
winter_signals: MI UP Lake Superior winter season
notes: Michigan UP alpine resort (formerly Big Snow Resort: Blackjack/Indianhead/Jackson Creek), 53 trails. Fallback: onthesnow.com/michigan/snowriver/ski-resort.

alt_text: Snowshoe Mountain Resort West Virginia - Alleghenies alpine view
notes: Largest WV alpine ski resort (Alterra), 56 trails. Fallback: onthesnow.com/west-virginia/snowshoe-mountain/ski-resort.

alt_text: Snowstar Winter Park Illinois - small alpine ski area
notes: Small IL alpine ski area, 15 trails. Fallback: onthesnow.com/illinois/snowstar/ski-resort.

alt_text: Snowy Range Ski Area Wyoming - Medicine Bow alpine view
notes: WY Medicine Bow alpine ski area, ~33 trails. Fallback: onthesnow.com/wyoming/snowy-range/ski-resort.

alt_text: Soda Springs Mountain Resort California - Sierra alpine view
notes: Sierra Nevada CA alpine ski area near Donner Pass, ~17 trails. Fallback: onthesnow.com/california/soda-springs/ski-resort.

Soldier Hollow (UT) is a 2002 Olympic Nordic/cross-country and biathlon venue - NOT alpine ski resort. No alpine lifts/trails. REJECT for hero-image strategy; falls outside scope of alpine resort sources (skiresort.info / OnTheSnow alpine).

alt_text: Soldier Mountain Idaho - alpine ski area view
notes: ID alpine ski area (Bruce Willis former owner, now nonprofit), 36 trails. Fallback: onthesnow.com/idaho/soldier-mountain/ski-resort.

alt_text: Solitude Mountain Resort Utah - Big Cottonwood Canyon alpine view
notes: Major UT Wasatch alpine resort (Alterra/Ikon), 82 trails, Big Cottonwood. Fallback: onthesnow.com/utah/solitude-mountain-resort/ski-resort.

alt_text: Song Mountain New York - Tully alpine ski area view
notes: Central NY alpine ski area (Tully), 25 trails. Fallback: onthesnow.com/new-york/song-mountain/ski-resort.

alt_text: Spirit Mountain Duluth Minnesota - Lake Superior alpine view
notes: Duluth MN alpine ski area, 22 trails. Fallback: onthesnow.com/minnesota/spirit-mountain/ski-resort.

alt_text: Spout Springs Ski Area Oregon - Blue Mountains alpine view
notes: OR Blue Mountains small alpine ski area, ~11 trails. Operation has been intermittent. Fallback: onthesnow.com/oregon/spout-springs/ski-resort.

alt_text: Spring Mountain Adventures Pennsylvania - small alpine ski area
notes: Small PA alpine ski area (Schwenksville), ~8 trails. Fallback: onthesnow.com/pennsylvania/spring-mountain-adventures/ski-resort.

alt_text: Spruce Mountain Ski Area Maine - small community alpine area
notes: Small ME community alpine ski area (Jay/Livermore Falls), ~10 trails. Fallback: onthesnow.com/maine/spruce-mountain/ski-resort.

alt_text: Steamboat Ski Resort Colorado - Champagne Powder alpine view
winter_signals: CO Yampa Valley winter season Nov-Apr
notes: Major CO alpine resort (Alterra/Ikon), 182 trails, Champagne Powder. Fallback: onthesnow.com/colorado/steamboat/ski-resort.

Steamboat Ski Touring Center is a Nordic/cross-country center (7 XC trails) - NOT alpine ski resort. No downhill alpine lifts. REJECT for hero-image strategy; falls outside scope of alpine resort sources (skiresort.info / OnTheSnow alpine).

alt_text: Stevens Pass Washington - Cascades alpine view
notes: Major WA Cascades alpine resort (Vail/Epic), 52 trails. Fallback: onthesnow.com/washington/stevens-pass/ski-resort.

alt_text: Stowe Mountain Resort Vermont - Mount Mansfield alpine view
notes: Major VT alpine resort (Vail/Epic), 116 trails, Mt Mansfield highest peak in VT. Fallback: onthesnow.com/vermont/stowe-mountain-resort/ski-resort.

alt_text: Stratton Mountain Vermont - Green Mountains alpine view
notes: Major southern VT alpine resort (Alterra/Ikon), 99 trails. Fallback: onthesnow.com/vermont/stratton-mountain/ski-resort.

alt_text: Sugar Bowl Resort California - Donner Summit Sierra alpine view
winter_signals: CA Sierra Donner Summit winter season
notes: Sierra CA alpine resort (Donner Summit), 105 trails. Fallback: onthesnow.com/california/sugar-bowl/ski-resort.

alt_text: Sugar Mountain Resort North Carolina - Blue Ridge alpine view
winter_signals: NC Blue Ridge winter season Dec-Mar
notes: Largest NC alpine resort (Blue Ridge), 21 trails. Fallback: onthesnow.com/north-carolina/sugar-mountain/ski-resort.

alt_text: Sugarbush Resort Vermont - Mad River Valley Green Mountains alpine view
notes: Major VT alpine resort (Alterra/Ikon), Lincoln Peak + Mt Ellen, 111 trails. Fallback: onthesnow.com/vermont/sugarbush-resort/ski-resort.

alt_text: Sugarloaf Maine - Carrabassett Valley alpine view
notes: Largest ME alpine resort (Boyne/Ikon), 176 trails, only above-treeline lift-served skiing in East. Fallback: onthesnow.com/maine/sugarloaf/ski-resort.

alt_text: Summit Ski Area Oregon - Mt Hood alpine view
notes: Mt Hood OR small alpine ski area (oldest ski area in PNW), ~5 trails. Fallback: onthesnow.com/oregon/summit-ski-area/ski-resort.

alt_text: Sun Valley Resort Idaho - Bald Mountain alpine view
notes: Historic ID alpine resort (Bald Mountain + Dollar), 121 trails, first chairlift in world. Fallback: onthesnow.com/idaho/sun-valley/ski-resort.

alt_text: Sunburst Wisconsin - Kettle Moraine alpine ski area view
notes: WI alpine ski area (Kewaskum), ~11 runs + large tubing operation. Likely duplicate of sunburst-area. Fallback: onthesnow.com/wisconsin/sunburst/ski-resort.

alt_text: Sunburst Ski Area Wisconsin - Kettle Moraine alpine view
notes: Likely duplicate of slug 'sunburst' (same WI Kewaskum alpine ski area), 11 trails. Stage-26 dedupe candidate. Fallback: onthesnow.com/wisconsin/sunburst/ski-resort.

alt_text: Sundance Mountain Resort Utah - Mount Timpanogos alpine view
notes: UT Wasatch alpine resort (Robert Redford founded), 45 trails, Mt Timpanogos. Fallback: onthesnow.com/utah/sundance/ski-resort.

alt_text: Sunday River Maine - Newry alpine view across 8 peaks
notes: Major ME alpine resort (Boyne/Ikon), 139 trails across 8 peaks. Fallback: onthesnow.com/maine/sunday-river/ski-resort.

alt_text: Sundown Mountain Iowa - Dubuque alpine ski area view
notes: IA alpine ski area (Dubuque), 21 trails. Fallback: onthesnow.com/iowa/sundown-mountain/ski-resort.
